githubRepos.name: omnigent-ai / omnigent
githubRepos.summary: A meta-harness for all your AI agents.  Omnigent provides a common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and the agents you write yourself: swap or combine harnesses without rewriting, keep them in check with policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time on the same live session, from any device.

globalNews.title: KPMG the latest firm to be caught out using AI
globalNews.summary: Top consultancy apparently used artificial intelligence to source parts of a report extolling virtues of AI

globalNews.title: Open-source AI may aid climate and development but deepen inequality, experts warn
globalNews.summary: Open-source artificial intelligence is advancing faster than the world can govern it, and the consequences could reshape the future of sustainability, democracy and global development. In a new comment published in Nature Communications, an international team of researchers warns that without coordinated action, open-source AI could also increase environmental pressures, deepen technological inequalities and facilitate the spread of misinformation.

globalNews.title: The midterms are approaching. What they could mean for the stock market - and the AI trade
globalNews.summary: The artificial intelligence trade that has powered U.S. stocks to record highs this year could face some headwinds from an unusual source: the midterm elections.

globalNews.title: SK Hynix tells investors its US listing plan wins their strong backing
globalNews.summary: SEOUL ― SK Hynix told investors this week it received “tremendously positive” feedback on its proposed US listing as the chipmaker benefits from strong demand for advanced memory semiconductors needed to run artificial intelligence (AI) data centers, a source familiar with the matter said on Thursday.

globalNews.title: The Battle for Your Mind
globalNews.summary: The Battle for Your Mind The future of human freedom hinges on who controls artificial intelligence. I believe we are at a crossroads: either we embrace decentralized, locally-run AI models that empower individuals, or we surrender to a centralized system where governments and Big Tech collude to ban open-source AI and concentrate cognitive power in […]

globalNews.title: EXCLUSIVE-SpaceX plans to set IPO price at $135 per share, targeting record $75 billion raise, source says
globalNews.summary: It is aiming for a valuation of $1.75 trillion, two other people said. The listing leads a wave of high-profile private companies preparing to test public markets after years of muted large-cap IPO activity, with SpaceX expected to be followed by artificial intelligence giants OpenAI and Anthropic.

globalNews.title: EXCLUSIVE-SpaceX plans to set IPO price at $135 per share, targeting $75 billion raise, source says
globalNews.summary: It is aiming for a valuation of $1.75 trillion, two other people said. The listing leads a wave of high-profile private companies preparing to test public markets after years of muted large-cap IPO activity, with SpaceX expected to be followed by artificial intelligence giants ‌OpenAI and Anthropic.

globalNews.title: EXCLUSIVE-SpaceX plans to price record-setting IPO at $135 per share, source says
globalNews.summary: Reuters reported earlier on Tuesday that the rocket and satellite communications company hoped to raise at least $75 billion, at a valuation of $1.75 trillion. The listing leads a wave of high-profile private companies preparing to test public markets after years of muted large-cap IPO activity, with SpaceX widely viewed as ‌one of the most consequential offerings in recent history alongside artificial intelligence giants OpenAI and Anthropic.

word.definition: 大模型生成的不符合事实的错误内容占比，是大模型核心评测指标之一
word.example: 毕马威等企业误用AI踩坑，大多是未将幻觉率纳入上线必测环节

interview.question: 某气候公益团队计划用开源大模型搭建全球灾害预警科普问答系统，需兼顾不同收入水平地区用户的使用公平性，你会如何设计整套落地评测方案？
points: 垂直领域大模型基础评测维度的设计能力
AI公平性在公益类场景下的落地评测方法
低资源受限环境下的轻量化评测落地思路
interview.answerLead: 锚定业务核心目标分层设计基础能力、公平性、场景适配三类评测链路
answer: 先搭建气候领域专业评测数据集，测试幻觉率、事实准确率、响应时延核心指标，筛选合格开源模型
构建覆盖多语种、不同认知水平用户的提问测试集，统计不同分组的回答准确率差异，排查歧视性输出
模拟低配硬件的低资源使用场景，测试模型内存占用、运行速度，保障欠发达地区可正常访问
上线后持续采集用户反馈做动态迭代评测，定期更新测试集补全新气候事件相关样本
